overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white cloak exploring a grassy field at dusk under a massive glowing red Erdtree. The character moves steadily toward ancient stone ruins while embers fall from the crimson sky, creating an atmospheric dark fantasy environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with scattered ruins and glowing red tree

events.description: ruined stone cottage passes out of view on the left as character moves deeper into the field

agents.ego_description: character in white cloak jogging through tall grass toward the glowing red Erdtree

entered.detail: massive glowing red tree dominating the sky with falling embers
collapsed stone building with broken roof
ancient stone wall with archway openings
tall green grass covering the ground
scattered trees with orange and green foliage

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a grassy field with a ruined cottage visible to the left and ancient stone ruins to the right. The massive red Erdtree glows intensely in the sky ahead, casting a warm crimson light over the landscape as embers drift down through the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland approaching stone archway ruins

events.description: stone archway ruins become prominent on the right as the character approaches

agents.ego_description: character continues jogging forward, approaching the stone ruins on the right side

entered.detail: detailed stone archways and columns of ancient structure
tall broken stone columns scattered among the ruins

segments.scene_description: Moving past the abandoned cottage, the character enters a more open area of the grassland. The stone ruins on the right resolve into detailed archways and broken columns as the character draws closer, while the Erdtree continues to dominate the sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the base of the glowing Erdtree with ruins on the right

events.description: character slightly adjusts direction to the right while passing the stone archways

agents.ego_description: character slows slightly while navigating past the stone ruins, continuing toward the glowing tree

entered.detail: the massive trunk and roots of the Erdtree becoming visible at the horizon
distant grassy hills with scattered boulders

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, the character passes by the stone archway ruins which recede into the background on the right. The base of the massive Erdtree becomes visible ahead, its roots glowing with intense red light, while the surrounding grassland opens up into rolling hills.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a crimson-lit grassland that gradually opens up toward the glowing base of a colossal tree. It begins in a field where a ruined cottage and ancient stone ruins frame the path, with embers drifting through the air under the intense glow of the red Erdtree. As the character moves past the abandoned cottage, the landscape expands and the stone ruins on the right resolve into detailed archways and broken columns. The scene then shifts as the character passes these archways, which recede into the background while the surrounding grassland opens into rolling hills. Finally, the camera reveals the massive base of the Erdtree ahead, its roots pulsing with an intense red light.
